About Us

Connecting Global Talent with Local Opportunities

Global Solutions for Workforce Shortage

Global Jobs Consulting is an All-Inclusive recruitment agency specialized in placing workforce from Asia and Africa in European markets. With a network of 11 partner agencies, we offer complete staffing solutions for employers in Romania, Austria, and Serbia.

We handle the entire process: from rigorous candidate selection, immigration documentation (visas and work permits), to community integration and long-term monitoring.

Global Network

Access to candidates from Asia and Africa through our 11 partner agencies.

Legal Compliance

We fully manage legal documentation: visas, work permits, and authorizations.

Fast Process

We deliver selected candidates as quickly as possible, with full support.

Ongoing Support

Long-term monitoring and assistance for successful integration.
